zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Maude d'Artois於1432年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林堂尼布盧可時，她的父親Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger23歲，母親Jane Serjeant23歲。她於大約1463年與Thomas Barnewall在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1496年12月14日享年64歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林聖 奧度恩斯 羅曼 凱利 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Maude d'Artois was born in 1432, in Donnybrook, County Dublin, Ireland, her father, Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger, was 23 and her mother, Jane Serjeant, was 23. She married Thomas Barnewall about 1463, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 14 December 1496, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Audoen's Roman Catholic Church, Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Maude d'Artois est née en 1432, à Donnybrook, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Serjeant, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Barnewall environ 1463, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1496, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à St Audoen's Roman Catholic Church, Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Maude d'Artois 1432 in Donnybrook, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Serjeant 23. Sie hat um 1463 in Irland Thomas Barnewall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1496 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in St Audoen's Roman Catholic Church, Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Maude d'Artois è nata il nel 1432 nel Donnybrook, County Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Serjeant, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Barnewall circa 1463, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1496, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a St Audoen's Roman Catholic Church, Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Maude d'Artoisが1432年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンドニーブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Jenico d'Artois The Youngerは23歳，母Jane Serjeantは23歳であった。約1463年にアイルランドでThomas Barnewallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1496年12月14日に64歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンスト アウドエン'ス ロマン カソリック チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Audoen's Church, Dublin, Dublin, L: 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린 스트 오도'스 로먼 캐토리치 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Maude d'Artois(이)가 1432년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 도니브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Serjeant(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1463년 아일랜드에서 Thomas Barnewall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 12월 14일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린 스트 오도'스 로먼 캐토리치 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Maude d'Artois nasceu em 1432, em Donnybrook, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Serjeant, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Barnewall aproximadamente 1463, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1496, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em St Audoen's Roman Catholic Church, Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.Saint Audoen's Church, Dublin, Dublin, L: ст аудоен'с роман католик чурч, дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Maude d'Artois родилась в 1432 г. в местности доннибрук, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir Jenico d'Artois The Younger было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Serjeant, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Barnewall около 1463 г. в местности Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1496 г. в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ст аудоен'с роман католик чурч, дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.

Se casó con Thomas Barnewall aproximadamente 1463, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
